description: HELIX Immune Library — Initial 20 Historical Attack Signatures

samples.name: The DAO Reentrancy
samples.root_cause: External call before state update; recursive withdrawal drains funds
samples.fix: Apply checks-effects-interactions pattern; add reentrancy guard modifier

samples.name: Parity Multisig Freeze
samples.root_cause: Library contract had public initWallet; attacker became owner and called kill()
samples.fix: Use initializer modifier with initialized flag; never expose init on library contracts

samples.name: bZx Flash Loan Attack
samples.root_cause: Flash loan used to manipulate oracle price; under-collateralized borrow executed
samples.fix: Use TWAP oracle; add flash loan detection; minimum collateral checks independent of spot price

samples.name: Harvest Finance Oracle Attack
samples.root_cause: Vault used spot Curve pool price for share calculation; attacker manipulated pool ratio
samples.fix: Use time-weighted oracle; add deposit/withdrawal delay; check price deviation threshold

samples.name: Wormhole Bridge Exploit
samples.root_cause: Deprecated secp256k1 verification allowed forged guardian signatures to mint wETH without deposit
samples.fix: Use current signature verification syscalls; multi-party threshold signatures; verify all guardian set changes

samples.name: Ronin Bridge Hack
samples.root_cause: 5 of 9 validator keys compromised; insufficient decentralization of bridge validators
samples.fix: Increase validator count and threshold; hardware key rotation; anomaly detection on large withdrawals

samples.name: Cream Finance Flash Loan V3
samples.root_cause: Flash loan inflated price of yUSD collateral; borrowed all lending pool assets
samples.fix: Cap borrow factor per collateral type; use decentralized oracle; add borrow amount circuit breaker

samples.name: Nomad Bridge Drain
samples.root_cause: Trusted root initialized to 0x00; any message with zero proof was accepted as valid
samples.fix: Never initialize trusted root to zero; require non-zero proof; add message replay protection

samples.name: Mango Markets Manipulation
samples.root_cause: Attacker pumped MNGO perp price with thin liquidity; used unrealized PnL as collateral to borrow
samples.fix: Use TWAP for collateral valuation; cap unrealized PnL as collateral; add position size limits relative to liquidity

samples.name: Euler Finance Flash Loan
samples.root_cause: donateToReserves allowed inflating debt without repayment check; combined with self-liquidation
samples.fix: Add access controls to donate functions; prevent self-liquidation; check health factor after donations

samples.name: Curve Finance Vyper Reentrancy
samples.root_cause: Vyper compiler 0.2.15-0.3.0 bug: @nonreentrant lock failed to protect cross-function reentrancy
samples.fix: Upgrade Vyper compiler beyond 0.3.0; add protocol-level reentrancy guard independent of compiler

samples.name: BeanStalk Governance Attack
samples.root_cause: Flash loan to acquire governance tokens; passed malicious proposal in single block via emergencyCommit
samples.fix: Add snapshot-based voting (exclude flash loan tokens); time-delay on governance execution; quorum based on time-weighted holdings

samples.name: PancakeBunny Flash Loan
samples.root_cause: Flash loan manipulated PancakeSwap LP price; reward calculation used spot LP value
samples.fix: Use TWAP for LP valuation; cap reward per block; add flash loan detection via balance check

samples.name: Poly Network Cross-Chain
samples.root_cause: Cross-chain message allowed changing keeper public keys; attacker replaced keepers and authorized own withdrawals
samples.fix: Immutable keeper set or multi-sig rotation; separate key management from message execution; add time-lock on keeper changes

samples.name: BadgerDAO Cloudflare Exploit
samples.root_cause: Compromised Cloudflare API key injected malicious approve() calls into frontend; users unknowingly approved attacker
samples.fix: Subresource integrity checks; hardware wallet approval verification; limit approval amounts; monitor abnormal approval patterns

samples.name: Wintermute DeFi Hack
samples.root_cause: Vanity address generated with Profanity tool had predictable private key due to weak entropy
samples.fix: Never use vanity address generators; use hardware-generated keys; multi-sig for treasury wallets

samples.name: Multichain Bridge Exploit
samples.root_cause: CEO held all MPC key shares; single point of failure when CEO was detained by authorities
samples.fix: Distribute MPC shares across independent parties; dead-man switch; transparent custody proof; geographic distribution

samples.name: Platypus Finance AAVE Attack
samples.root_cause: Flash loan deposited large amount; emergencyWithdraw did not check debt position; solvency check bypassed
samples.fix: Check debt position in all withdrawal paths including emergency; add flash loan guards to emergency functions

samples.name: KyberSwap Elastic Exploit
samples.root_cause: Tick boundary rounding error in concentrated liquidity math; attacker exploited precision loss at extreme tick values
samples.fix: Add bounds checking at tick boundaries; use higher precision intermediary calculations; fuzz test extreme tick values

samples.name: Socket Gateway Bridge
samples.root_cause: Newly added route contract had unvalidated user input passed to arbitrary call; attacker drained approved tokens
samples.fix: Whitelist call targets; validate all user inputs; audit all new route additions; add approval limits per route
